from myapp.models import *
from myapp.utils import *


def process_order(order_data: dict) -> dict:
    order = Order(**order_data)
    validate_order(order)
    calculate_totals(order)
    apply_discounts(order)
    return order.to_dict()


def generate_report(report_type: str) -> dict:
    data = fetch_report_data(report_type)
    formatted = format_report(data)
    export_to_pdf(formatted)
    return formatted


def sync_inventory(warehouse_id: int) -> None:
    items = get_warehouse_items(warehouse_id)
    for item in items:
        update_stock_levels(item)
        notify_low_stock(item)
